posts.text: It’s Lebanon.    In less than 2 weeks, Israel has killed 570 people and displaced 750,000 — over 10% of the entire country. Residential buildings are being bombed with no warning.  The U.S. cannot continue to be complicit in Netanyahu’s wars.

posts.text: Not content to control the economy and own much of the media, the billionaire class is now buying elections and undermining American democracy.   Yes. We need a wealth tax on billionaires.  Yes. We need to overturn Citizens United.

posts.text: Putin’s invasion of Ukraine - 500,000 dead. Netanyahu’s war against the people of Gaza - 72,000 dead. Trump’s war in Iran - thousands dead already.

posts.text: We’re told there’s not enough money for health care, affordable housing or education.  But somehow there are billions for an illegal & unconstitutional war with Iran. We need a government that works for all of us — not the military-industrial complex, not Israel, not super PACs.

billionaires-wealth.quote: Billionaire Tax Now (A Special Rebroadcast at 8PM ET)
There’s an addiction destroying this country. It’s the insatiable greed of a billionaire class.
Yes. We must tax billionaires. And it starts in California.
LIVE from Los Angeles: Billionaire Tax Now
Fighting Oligarchy: Where We Go From Here with Bernie Sanders in Durham, NC

Not content to control the economy and own much of the media, the billionaire class is now buying elections and undermining American democracy.   Yes. We need a wealth tax on billionaires.  Yes. We need to overturn Citizens United.
